report_name: AssuranceAmerica Data Breach Impacts Over 1.1 Million, Exposing SSNs and Driver's Licenses

identities.name: AssuranceAmerica Managing General Agency, LLC
identities.description: An Atlanta-based insurance provider that reported a data breach affecting over 1.1 million individuals. The breach resulted from a targeted attack on an employee, leading to the exfiltration of sensitive policyholder data including Social Security numbers and driver's license numbers.

indicators.name: Data Staging with Common Archiving Tools
indicators.pattern:
title: Data Staging with Common Archiving Tools
id: 2b8a1c9d-5e6f-4a3b-8c1d-9e8f7a6b5c4d
status: experimental
description: Detects the command-line execution of common archiving utilities like 7z or rar, which are often used by attackers to compress and stage data for exfiltration.
references:
  - https://www.thv11.com/article/news/nation-world/assuranceamerica-data-breach-social-security-what-to-know/507-3a00baba-d58e-47c8-992a-b17eebe61b71
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-29
tags:
  - attack.t1560
  - attack.collection
level: medium
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\7z.exe'
      - '\rar.exe'
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - ' a '
      - ' -p'
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of archiving tools by administrators or software.
indicators.description: Detects the use of common archiving tools (7z, rar) via command line, a technique attackers often use to stage data for exfiltration, as suggested in the report's hunting hints.

indicators.name: Outbound Connection to Unsanctioned Cloud Storage
indicators.pattern:
title: Outbound Connection to Unsanctioned Cloud Storage
id: 8c1d9e8f-7a6b-4c5d-8e9f-0a1b2c3d4e5f
status: experimental
description: Detects outbound network connections to common, non-sanctioned cloud storage providers that can be used for data exfiltration.
references:
  - https://www.thv11.com/article/news/nation-world/assuranceamerica-data-breach-social-security-what-to-know/507-3a00baba-d58e-47c8-992a-b17eebe61b71
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-29
tags:
  - attack.t1567.002
  - attack.exfiltration
level: medium
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    DestinationHostname|endswith:
      - '.mega.nz'
      - '.mega.io'
      - '.dropbox.com'
    Initiated: 'true'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate, but potentially unsanctioned, use of these cloud storage services by employees.
indicators.description: Detects network traffic to common, non-sanctioned cloud storage providers like Mega or Dropbox, a potential data exfiltration method mentioned in the report's hunting hints.
